## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit style title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the behaviour change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
